docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - SIGNED - SERVED JUN-06-2013, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT STERN, IDEXA

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUL-16-2013 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUL-16-2013 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-16-2013 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LABSIR, MOHAMMED RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT STERN, IDEXA $3,001.23 PRINCIPAL, $60.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,061.23 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF LABSIR, MOHAMMED AS TO DEFENDANT STERN, IDEXA
AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,001.23 FILED BY LABSIR, MOHAMMED AS TO DEFENDANT STERN, IDEXA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-16-2013 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
